issues.detail: The guide does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases for payment processing.
The documentation contains some verbose explanations that could be trimmed for brevity.

scenarios.name: saq-selection-stripe
scenarios.rationale: Baseline incorrectly suggests SAQ A for Stripe Elements; treatment correctly assigns SAQ A-EP, explains why (JS-based payment form means the page can influence card capture), and gives the medium ~191-requirement scope from the skill's SAQ table.

scenarios.name: logging-and-storage-rules
scenarios.rationale: Baseline mentions tokenization and CVV avoidance but misses log retention and exact masking rules; treatment cites the SAD prohibition, first-6-last-4 masking, structured CHD-access logs with card_last4, and the 12-month / 3-month retention rule from Req 10.
